# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: ingress-hello-app
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: hello-app # used as selector in router
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: hello-app-01
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: "Helm"
    helm.sh/chart: "mychart-v0102345"
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  tls:
  - hosts:
      - "hello-app.localhost" # your choice of domain
    secretName: "default-cert"  # default generated certificate
  rules:
  - host: hello-app.localhost
    http:
      paths:
      - pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: hello-svc
            port:
              number: 80
